seo.title: Top 10 Things to Do in Stockholm, Sweden

seo.intro: Planning a trip to Stockholm? Explore the best places to visit in Stockholm, Sweden.

places.name: Gamla Stan
places.description: Stockholm's charming old town, filled with colorful 17th-century buildings and historic squares.

places.name: Vasa Museum
places.description: A world-renowned maritime museum showcasing an intact, salvaged 1628 warship.

places.name: The Royal Palace
places.description: The official residence of the Swedish monarch, boasting magnificent Baroque state rooms.

places.name: Skansen Open-Air Museum
places.description: The world's oldest open-air museum, exhibiting traditional Swedish heritage and wildlife.

places.name: Stockholm City Hall
places.description: Stockholm's iconic civic landmark, famous for its grand brick architecture and spectacular tower panoramas.

places.description: A dynamic global hotspot for contemporary photography, set in a historic industrial building.
